category_sources: Official GitHub README describes observer_ward as a service and web application fingerprint identification tool.
source_facts.description says it identifies web applications and services by fingerprint.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses observer_ward.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, getting started, CLI help, fingerprint updates, and options.
source_facts.homepage is the project page on the Kali Team blog.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/emo-crab/observer_ward; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README lists service and web fingerprinting, YAML probes, version identification, NVD CPE naming, and Nuclei integration.
source_facts.description identifies web application and service fingerprint identification.
